debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Core system initializing...'

set_value.name: global.$GT_TradesAwaitingValidation
set_value.comment: Trades found by MD, awaiting AI validation

set_value.name: global.$GT_XPEventQueue
set_value.comment: Event queue for instant XP processing

set_value.name: global.$GT_TrainingEventQueue
set_value.comment: Event queue for instant training processing

set_value.name: global.$GT_FleetEventQueue
set_value.comment: Event queue for instant fleet coordination

set_value.name: global.$GT_MarketEventQueue
set_value.comment: Event queue for instant market intelligence

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Event-driven signaling system initialized (XP + Training + Fleet + Market)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Previously disabled features have been re-enabled with event-driven architecture'
'[GT-Core] Cleaned up ' + $cleanupCount + ' incorrect legacy globals (gt_AdvancedAnalytics, gt_FleetCoord, gt_SatelliteIntel, gt_ThreatIntel)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Core system initialization complete'

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.keys.count gt 0 and global.$GT_Pilots?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] SystemInit: Seeded cleaned original name for pilot ' + $pilot.name + ': ' + $cleanedName + ' (from: ' + $ship.knownname + ')'

set_value.name: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs
set_value.comment: Protected GT order IDs (canonical; refreshed each session)

do_if.value: $ship.defaultorder? and @$ship.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyMiner' and $ship.order? and @$ship.order.id == 'GalaxyMiner' and $ship.defaultorder.isrunning and $ship.order.isrunning and (($ship.orders? and $ship.orders.count == 0) or not $ship.orders?) and $ship.pilot? and @$ship.pilot.exists and (not global.$GT_CleanupIntent? or not global.$GT_CleanupIntent.{$ship}?) and (not global.$GT_OrphanVerifyPending? or not global.$GT_OrphanVerifyPending.{$ship}?) and (not global.$GT_DelayedVerificationState? or not global.$GT_DelayedVerificationState.{$ship}?)

debug_text.text: '[GT-LoadHeal] RESTART_GHOST_GALAXYMINER ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' commander=' + (if $ship.commander? and $ship.commander.exists then $ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ' defaultRunning=1 currentRunning=1 orders=' + (if $ship.orders? then $ship.orders.count else 0)
'[GT-LoadHeal] END_GHOST recovered=' + $recoveredCount + ' age=' + (player.age / 1s)i

event_object_order_ready.comment: Detect when player-owned ships get order-ready transitions

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Registering new trading ship: ' + $ship.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] XP registration triggered for pilot ' + $ship.pilot.name + ' on ship ' + $ship.knownname

do_if.value: event.param.$PendingSubs? and typeof event.param.$PendingSubs == datatype.list and event.param.$PendingSubs.count gt 0
$sub? and $sub.exists and $sub.isplayerowned and not ($sub.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$sub.defaultorder.id}))

global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$sub.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$sub.pilot}.$AssociatedShip? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$sub.pilot}.$AssociatedShip == $sub and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$sub}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$sub}.$Pilot? and global.$GT_Ships.{$sub}.$Pilot == $sub.pilot

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Commander GT reactivation delayed pass #' + $attempt + ': processed ' + $reactivatedSubs + ' subordinate(s) for commander ' + $commander.idcode + ' (source=' + $sourceMode + ', light=' + $lightRefreshedSubs + ', full=' + $fullRefreshedSubs + ', unresolved=' + $unresolvedSubs.count + ')'

do_if.value: ($commander.allsubordinates? and @$commander.allsubordinates.count gt 0) or ($commander.subordinates? and @$commander.subordinates.count gt 0) or $reportedSubCount gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Commander GT state transition: ACTIVE for ' + $commander.idcode + ' (source=' + (if $payload.$Source? then $payload.$Source else 'unknown') + ', subCount=' + $reportedSubCount + ')'
'[GT-Core] Commander GT state transition: INACTIVE for ' + $commander.idcode + ' (source=' + (if $payload.$Source? then $payload.$Source else 'unknown') + ', subCount=' + $reportedSubCount + ')'

do_if.value: not $hasGTOrder and $ship.order? and @$ship.order.id == 'DockAndPilotExchange' and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange

set_value.name: $context
set_value.exact: table[ $Source = $defaultSource, $TraceId = if $ship? and $ship.exists then $ship.idcode + '|' + $defaultTraceTag + '|' + (player.age / 1s)i else 'UNKNOWN|' + $defaultTraceTag + '|' + (player.age / 1s)i, $Force = false ]

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] ' + $debugLabel + ': Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' still needs level ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$BlockedLevel + ' training'

'[GT-Core] Vanilla pilot assignment detected: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', old=' + $oldPilotName + (if $oldPilot and $oldPilot.idcode? then ' [' + $oldPilot.idcode + ']' else '') + ', oldTpl=' + (if $oldPilotTemplate? then $oldPilotTemplate else 'NONE') + ', new=' + $newPilotName + (if $newPilot and $newPilot.idcode? then ' [' + $newPilot.idcode + ']' else '') + ', newTpl=' + (if $newPilotTemplate? then $newPilotTemplate else 'NONE') + ', hasGTOrder=' + $hasGTOrder

do_if.value: $oldPilot and $oldPilot.exists and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}? and $oldPilot != $newPilot

set_value.name: global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}.$PausedReason
set_value.exact: 'Vanilla pilot reassignment - preserving GT XP data'

do_if.value: $candidate and $candidate != $newPilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidate}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidate}.$Status? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidate}.$Status == 'paused'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Reattached GT pilot after vanilla reassignment: new=' + $newPilot.name + (if $newPilot.idcode? then ' [' + $newPilot.idcode + ']' else '') + ', recoveredFrom=' + $bestCandidate.name + (if $bestCandidate.idcode? then ' [' + $bestCandidate.idcode + ']' else '') + ', XP=' + $xp + ', level=' + $level + ', hasGTOrder=' + $hasGTOrder

do_if.value: $crew and (($crew.seed? and $crew.seed == $newPilotTemplate) or $crew == $newPilotTemplate) and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] FinalizeVanillaPilotAssignmentForGT: registered promoted pilot for active GT order: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotName + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt
'[GT-Core] FinalizeVanillaPilotAssignmentForGT: refreshed existing GT pilot for active GT order: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotName + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$Pilot? and not (global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$Pilot.exists? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$Pilot.exists)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] FinalizeVanillaPilotAssignmentForGT: unresolved promoted pilot (ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', source=' + $source + ', tpl=' + (if $newPilotTemplate? then $newPilotTemplate else 'NONE') + ', attempt=' + $attempt + ')'

do_if.value: $pilot and $pilot.exists? and $pilot.exists and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] FinalizeVanillaPilotAssignmentForGT: synchronized GT pilot without active GT order: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + (if $pilot.name? then $pilot.name else 'NONE') + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt

do_if.value: $ship and $ship.exists and global.$GT_Pilots? and ($oldStable != '' or ($oldPilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}?))

set_value.name: $crewEntity
set_value.exact: if $crew and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists then $ship.roleentity.{$crew} else null

do_if.value: not $candidate and $oldTemplate? and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$oldTemplate}? and (not $oldPilot or $ship.roleentity.{$oldTemplate} != $oldPilot)

set_value.name: $crewEntity
set_value.exact: if $crew and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists then $ship.roleentity.{$crew} else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Resolved demoted GT pilot identity: old=' + $oldPilotNameDbg + ', reg=' + $registryPilotNameDbg + ', oldTpl=' + (if $oldTemplate? then $oldTemplate else 'NONE') + ', stable=' + (if $oldStable != '' then $oldStable else 'NONE') + ', new=' + $candidate.name + (if $candidate.idcode? then ' [' + $candidate.idcode + ']' else '') + ', ship=' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Core] Resolved demoted GT pilot identity (existing key): ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', stable=' + (if $oldStable != '' then $oldStable else 'NONE') + ', pilot=' + $candidateNameDbg
'[GT-Core] ResolveDemotedPilotIdentity retry: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', old=' + $oldPilotNameDbg + ', stable=' + (if $oldStable != '' then $oldStable else 'NONE') + ', attempt=' + $attempt

set_value.name: $crewEntity
set_value.exact: if $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists then $ship.roleentity.{$crew} else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] ResolvePilotIdentityByStable: rebound pilot stable=' + $stable + ' source=' + $source + ' ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', new=' + $crewCandidate.name + ', old=' + $registryPilotNameDbg
'[GT-Core] ResolvePilotIdentityByStable retry: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', stable=' + $stable + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt

do_if.value: $pilot and $pilot.exists? and $pilot.exists and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Deferred pilot tag refresh applied: pilot=' + $pilot.name + (if $pilot.idcode? then ' [' + $pilot.idcode + ']' else '') + ', source=' + $source
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Unregistering destroyed ship: ' + $ship.knownname

do_if.value: $ship.exists and $ship.isoperational and global.$GT_ActiveTraderCount? and global.$GT_ActiveTraderCount gt 0
not $pilotLinkedToDestroyedShip and $destroyedShipID != '' and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilotKey}.$ShipID? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilotKey}.$ShipID == $destroyedShipID

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship destroyed; preserving pilot registry for potential rescue/reassignment: ' + $ship.pilot.name
'[GT-Core] Commander destroyed: ' + @$destroyedCommander.knownname + ' (ID: ' + @$destroyedCommander.idcode + ') - checking ' + $subordinates.count + ' subordinates'
'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' was promoted to commander (has direct GT order: ' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', has subordinates: ' + $hasSubordinates + ')'
'[GT-Core] Skipping cleanup for promoted subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' (now commander)'
'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' has commander property updated to ' + $promotedSubordinate.idcode
'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' found in promoted commander ' + $promotedSubordinate.idcode + ' subordinates list (timing workaround)'

'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' not reassigned to promoted commander ' + $promotedSubordinate.idcode + ' (commander: ' + $subCommander + ', promoted has ' + (@$promotedSubordinate.allsubordinates.count) + ' subordinates)'
'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' automatically reassigned to new GT commander ' + $newCommander.idcode + ' (X4 auto-promotion)'
'[GT-Core] Subordinate ' + $subordinate.idcode + ' lost GT commander (destroyed) - triggering cleanup'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Saving system state...'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] System state saved'

event_object_signalled.comment: Handle ship registration from AI scripts

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Processing queued registration for ' + $ship.knownname + ' (queue: ' + global.$GT_RegistrationQueue.$Ships.count + ' remaining)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship registered using GT_Ship_Management library: ' + $ship.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Library not available, using fallback registration for ' + $ship.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] XP System: NEW pilot ' + $ship.pilot.name + ' initialized with 0 XP, skill level 1 (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] PAUSED PILOT DETECTED: Restoring ' + $ship.pilot.name + ' with XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$XP + ' (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Core] Stored cleaned original ship name for existing pilot: ' + $cleanedName + ' (from: ' + $ship.knownname + ') (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] XP System: EXISTING pilot ' + $ship.pilot.name + ' restored with XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$XP + ' (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Fallback registration complete for ship: ' + $ship.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Deferred ship name update completed for ' + $ship.knownname

'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=HandleShipOrderAborted ship=' + (if $ship? then $ship.idcode else 'NONE') + ' default=' + $dbgDefaultOrder + ' reason=' + $reason

do_if.value: $reason == 'Commander lost GT order' or $reason == 'Commander removed' or $reason == 'Commander lost GT order (Lua detection)' or $reason == 'Commander cleanup'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cleanup] Cleaning up subordinate (commander lost GT order): ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ') - preserving active orders'
'[GT-Cleanup] Removed GT equipment mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship=' + $hasShipMod + ', engine=' + $hasEngineMod + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship removed from GT_Ships registry: ' + $ship.idcode
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] TRAINING STATE PRESERVED: Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' was XP blocked at level ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$BlockedLevel + ' - will restore training requirement'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Pilot marked as paused (XP preserved): ' + $pilot.name + ' - XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP + ' (will be restored when re-registered)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship cleanup completed for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot XP preserved)'
'[GT-Cleanup] Cleaning up ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ') - ' + $reason

do_elseif.value: $reason == 'Missing pilot (Lua detection)' or $reason == 'Missing pilot' or $reason == 'Pilot transferred away - GT order cannot run without pilot' or $reason == 'No pilot assigned'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cleanup] No pilot detected - cancelling all orders and removing default order: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Cleanup] Ship has pilot - removing from registry only, leaving orders intact: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Cleanup] Removed GT equipment mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship=' + $hasShipMod + ', engine=' + $hasEngineMod + ')'
'[GT-Cleanup] Cleared search results for ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Cleanup] Cleared fallback attempted flag for ' + $ship.idcode
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship removed from GT_Ships registry: ' + $ship.idcode

set_value.name: global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$PausedReason
set_value.exact: 'Order aborted - preserving XP data for reactivation'

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Pilot paused (preserving XP data): ' + $pilot.name + ' (XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP + ', Level: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level else 1) + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Pilot kept active (has other active ships): ' + $pilot.name
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship cleanup completed for ' + $ship.idcode
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship order paused for ' + $ship.knownname + ': ' + $reason + ' (preserving XP: ' + $preserveData + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship name PRESERVED during pause: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship modification tracking cleared for ' + $ship.knownname

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship registry cleaned for pause: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (preserved OriginalShipName=' + (if $preservedOriginalShipName? and $preservedOriginalShipName != null and $preservedOriginalShipName != '' then 'yes' else 'no') + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] TRAINING STATE PRESERVED: Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' was XP blocked at level ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$BlockedLevel + ' - will restore training requirement'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Pilot marked as paused (XP preserved): ' + $pilot.name + ' - XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship pause completed for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot XP data preserved)'
'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=NONE action=FILTERED_SHIP_NOT_EXISTS'

do_if.value: $ship.defaultorder? and ((@$ship.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @$ship.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.defaultorder.id})) or (@$ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$ship.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or @$ship.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))) )

debug_text.text: '[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' action=FILTERED_NOT_IN_REGISTRY'
'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' action=RECOVERY_REREGISTER_ACTIVE_GT default=' + $dbgActiveDefaultOrder

do_if.value: not $force and ((not $defaultOrderId or $defaultOrderId == null) or $commanderDefaultNull or ($defaultOrderId == 'Assist' and not $commanderExists))

debug_text.text: '[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' action=FILTERED_PROMOTION_WINDOW default=' + (if $defaultOrderId then $defaultOrderId else 'NONE') + ' commanderExists=' + $commanderExists + ' commanderDefaultNull=' + $commanderDefaultNull + ' force=' + $force

'[GT-Cleanup] Deferring orphan cleanup (promotion window): ' + $ship.idcode + ' (defaultOrder=' + (if $defaultOrderId then $defaultOrderId else 'null') + ', commanderExists=' + $commanderExists + ', commanderDefaultNull=' + $commanderDefaultNull + ')'
'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' intent=CLEARED_DIRECT_GT'
'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' intent=EXPIRED_BUT_STILL_SUBORDINATE -> CLEARED'

'[GT-CleanupTrace] trace=' + $cleanupTraceId + ' source=' + $cleanupSource + ' cue=CheckShipOrphaned ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' force=' + $force + ' inRegistry=' + $shipInRegistry + ' default=' + @$ship.defaultorder.id + ' commander=' + $dbgCommanderId + ' commanderOrder=' + $dbgCommanderOrder + ' intentActive=' + $intentActive + ' intentExpired=' + $intentExpired + ' intentSource=' + $intentSource + ' intentTrace=' + $intentTraceId

'[GT-Cleanup] Decision=' + $cleanupDecision + ' ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' default=' + @$ship.defaultorder.id + ' commander=' + $dbgCommanderId + ' commanderOrder=' + $dbgCommanderOrder + ' hasDirect=' + $gtStatus.$HasDirectGTOrder + ' hasGTCommander=' + $gtStatus.$HasGTCommander + ' inRegistry=' + $gtStatus.$InRegistry
'[GT-Cleanup] Cleaning up detached ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Cleanup] Duplicate cleanup signal suppressed for ' + $ship.idcode + ' token=' + $cleanupToken
'[GT-Cleanup] Cleaning up ship without pilot: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'

param.name: reason
param.value: 'Pilot transferred away - GT order cannot run without pilot (event-driven check)'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Starting migration: Original ship names from pilot to ship registry...'
'[GT-Core] Skipped migration for ship ' + $ship.knownname + ' - already has OriginalShipName: ' + global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$OriginalShipName
'[GT-Core] Migration complete: ' + $migratedCount + ' ship names migrated, ' + $skippedCount + ' skipped (already in ship registry)'
'[GT-Cleanup] Skipping subordinate cleanup for commander ' + $commander.idcode + ' after verify (hasGT=' + $commanderHasGTNow + ', defaultOrderNull=' + $commanderDefaultOrderNull + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Running one-time legacy ship name fix...'
'[GT-Legacy] Ship ' + $ship.idcode + ' needs update: name matches original exactly'
'[GT-Core] Cleanup: Stored cleaned original name: ' + $cleanedName + ' (from: ' + $ship.knownname + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Fixed ship name: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Pilot: ' + $ship.pilot.name + ', Level: ' + $currentSkillLevel + ', XP: ' + $currentXP + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Legacy ship name fix complete: ' + $fixedCount + ' ships updated, ' + $skippedCount + ' ships already properly named'
'[GT-Core] UpdateAllShipNames skipped: ship renaming disabled'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Updating all ship names based on new naming configuration...'
'[GT-Core] UpdateAllShipNames skipped: missing global.$GT_Ships OriginalShipName for ship ' + $ship.knownname + ' (' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Updated ship name: ' + $ship.idcode + ' -> ' + $newName
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship name update complete: ' + $updatedCount + ' ships updated'

event_object_signalled.comment: Handle ship updates from AI scripts

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Ship modification update QUEUED: ' + (if $ship? then $ship.knownname else 'NULL') + ' (Type: ' + $updateType + ', queued=' + global.$GT_ShipUpdateQueue.$Ships.count + ')'
'[GT-Core] Ship modification update requested: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (Type: ' + $updateType + ')'
'[GT-Core] DEBUG: GT_Ship_Management library check result: ' + md.GT_Ship_Management.Handle_Pilot_Ship_Assignment?
'[GT-Core] Applied ship modifications after training completion for ' + $pilot.name
'[GT-Core] GT_Ship_Management library not available - ship modifications skipped'
'[GT-Core] Processing pilot change on ' + $ship.knownname + ' - Old: ' + @$oldPilot.name + ', New: ' + @$pilot.name
'[GT-Core] Pilot change deferred: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' has no bound pilot yet - delegating to FinalizeVanillaPilotAssignmentForGT'
'[GT-Core] Pilot change: Checking old ship ' + $oldShip.idcode + ' (inRegistry=' + (if $oldShipInRegistry then 'YES' else 'NO') + ')'
'[GT-Core] New pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' is registered GT pilot - updating ship name'
'[GT-Core] New pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' is NOT registered GT pilot - restoring original ship name'
'[GT-Core] Ship name restored to: ' + $originalName
'[GT-Core] Registered new unregistered pilot: ' + $pilot.name

set_value.name: global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}.$PausedReason
set_value.exact: 'Pilot changed on ship - preserving XP data'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Core] Old pilot paused (preserving XP): ' + $oldPilot.name + ' (XP: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$oldPilot}.$XP else 0) + ')'
'[GT-Core] Applied ship modifications after pilot change on ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-Core] GT_Ship_Management library not available - pilot change modifications skipped'
'[GT-Core] Applied ship modifications after level up for ' + $pilot.name
'[GT-Core] GT_Ship_Management library not available - level up modifications skipped'
